Name: Tether (Eric Prydz Vs. CHVRCHES)
Era: The Bones of What You Believe
Description: Collaborative remix of the album track "Tether". The original mix was released on February 16 via Pryda Recordings on Beatport (PRY030); the radio edit followed on February 17 via Virgin EMI Records. Wikipedia and Beatport cite Feb 16; Discogs (r6685599) and MusicBrainz (532f901c) reference the Feb 17 radio edit release.

Name: Get Away / Dead Air
Era: The Bones of What You Believe
Description: UK Record Store Day 2015 release; 7" vinyl double A-side limited to 1,000 copies (cat# VS 2116). Get Away on the A-side, Dead Air on the AA-side. Mastered by Christian Wright at Abbey Road Studios.

Name: Leave a Trace
Description: Lead single from 'Every Open Eye'. Physical CD/Vinyl release was September 11, 2015.

Name: Warning Call (Theme From Mirror’s Edge Catalyst)
Bury It
Description: Remix of the Every Open Eye album track featuring Hayley Williams; premiered on Annie Mac's BBC Radio 1 show on June 9, officially released June 10. The collaboration began with a live debut at Marathon Music Works, Nashville on October 27, 2015

Name: Call It Off
Description: Contributed to 'The Con X: Covers', a tenth-anniversary covers album for Tegan and Sara's 'The Con'; proceeds benefited the Tegan and Sara Foundation. The band shared the track on social media on September 19; the album was released on October 20, 2017.

Name: LOVE. (triple j Like A Version)
Description: Performed for triple j's 'Like a Version' segment in Australia. Date reflects the triple j video publication on July 20; the Pitchfork article covering the release was published July 19.

Name: Project Unfollow
Description: 4 Track EP with additional songs: Come Through (The Regrettes), Heaven or Las Vegas (Cocteau Twins)

Name: Good Girls (John Carpenter Remix) b/w Turning The Bones (CHVRCHES Remix)
Description: Sacred Bones 7-inch (SBR290) on which John Carpenter remixed "Good Girls" and CHVRCHES remixed Carpenter's "Turning the Bones". Sacred Bones lists August 4 as the official release date; the individual digital remixes became available August 6 alongside the band's announcement of the collaboration. The physical 7-inch shipped December 10, 2021.
